page_content:
Formerly: EDPS301.

TLPL361 Community, Learners, and Classroom Engagement (3 Credits) Focuses on classroom community building as an ethic of caring for students and examines the connection between classroom engagement and learning. Topics include student agency, the context and design

of learning experiences, and the practices that sustain students’ engagement in learning. Wellness strategies to support teacher resilience are also addressed.
